info.title: REST API for Common Features in Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications - Manage Tasks
info.description:
Last Updated May 2026

You can use Oracle REST APIs to view and manage data stored in Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications.

Whether you're experienced with or new to REST, use this guide to find what you need, including:

  • A quick start how-to that walks you through a simple request example.
  • Use cases that provide real-world solutions with code examples.
  • Detailed descriptions for each REST resource.

Some REST resources have more than one version. In the Tasks section, when you expand a resource that has more than one version, you'll notice that the main folder contains subfolders, such as 11.13.18.05 and v1 (latest), corresponding to the available resource versions. Resources that don't have a newer version continue to appear without any change in their folder structure. You can find additional details on how to work with the different resource versions in the Quick Start and other topics in the Get Started section.
info.x-summary: Last Updated May 2026 You can use Oracle REST APIs to view and manage data stored in Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications.

get.description: Retrieves a task list for the current user.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Task status
(Task status COMPLETED is valid when used with following assignments - ADMIN, ALL, PREVIOUS)

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Task priority from 1 (highest) to 5 (lowest) or Any (default)

parameters.name: dueDateFrom
parameters.description: Start of due date range in ISO-8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS[.sss]Z

parameters.name: dueDateTo
parameters.description: End of due date range in ISO-8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS[.sss]Z

parameters.name: assignment
parameters.description:
Task assignees - MY, GROUP, MY_AND_GROUP (default), MY_AND_GROUP_ALL, REPORTEES, OWNER, REVIEWER, PREVIOUS, ALL, ADMIN.

MY - Displays tasks that are assigned exclusively to you. 
GROUP - Displays tasks that are assigned to a group of which you are a member. 
MY_AND_GROUP -Displays tasks that are assigned to anyone, including you, in the groups you belongs to.This will not fetch tasks that are acquired by some other user in the groups you belong to.
MY_AND_GROUP_ALL -Displays tasks that are assigned to anyone, including you, in the groups you belongs to.This will even fetch tasks that are acquired by some other user in the groups you belong to.
REPORTEES - Displays tasks that are assigned to reportees of you
OWNER - Displays tasks in which you are task owner.
REVIEWER -Displays tasks for which you are a reviewer
PREVIOUS - Displays tasks that were previously updated by you
ALL - No filtering; Displays all tasks regardless of assignment or creator. 
ADMIN -  No filtering; Displays all tasks regardless of assignment or creator.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Keyword in task title

parameters.name: fromuser
parameters.description: Previous task assignee

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items per page, preferably between 1 and 100, default 25. Zero or negative value will render the parameter inapplicable and all results will be returned in single page

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Index for the first item on a page of list items. Negative value will render the parameter inapplicable

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Field with which results are to be ordered.  Given as orderBy=fieldname:asc/desc, default is asc for ascending.Field Names supported are createdDate, creator, updatedDate, fromUser, tasknumber,  priority,ownerUser, state, approvalDuration,taskDefinitionName, taskNameSpace, taskId, category,assignedDate, dueDate,outcome,ecid, identificationKey

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Displays only the selected task attributes, which can include createdDate, creator, updatedDate, fromUser, tasknumber,  priority,ownerUser, state, approvalDuration,taskDefinitionName, taskNameSpace, taskId, category,assignedDate, dueDate,outcome,ecid, identificationKey

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: If pattern value is set to 'ToDo' then only ToDo tasks are returned.

parameters.name: showActionFlag
parameters.description: Show Action - true or false

parameters.name: showPermissionFlag
parameters.description: Show Permission - true or false

parameters.name: metadataFlag
parameters.description: metadataFlag - true or false. if metadataFlag is true, then task details URL is populated.

parameters.name: totalResults
parameters.description: Total Result - true or false

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Returned items must be created later than the specified time, in ISO-8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS[.sss]Z

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Returned items must be created before the specified time, in ISO-8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS[.sss]Z

parameters.name: identificationKey
parameters.description: if provided, only tasks with the given task identification key are returned

parameters.name: outcome
parameters.description: if provided, only tasks with the given task outcome value are returned

parameters.name: createdBy
parameters.description: if provided, only tasks created by the given user are returned

put.description: Performs the action on multiple tasks based on the payload. The following actions are available and the actions depend on the application: APPROVE, REJECT, REASSIGN, DELEGATE, WITHDRAW, SUSPEND, RESUME, DELETE, PURGE and ESCALATE. Custom Actions depend on the task definition.

get.description: Retrieves a list of custom task lists (views) that the current user has defined.
Retrieves a custom task list by name.

parameters.name: viewname
parameters.description: View Name

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Task status - ASSIGNED (default), SUSPENDED, WITHDRAWN, EXPIRED, ERROR, ALERTED

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Task priority from 1 (highest) to 5 (lowest) or Any (default)

parameters.name: fromuser
parameters.description: Previous task assignee

parameters.name: dueDateFrom
parameters.description: Start of due date range in ISO-8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS[.sss]Z

parameters.name: dueDateTo
parameters.description: End of due date range in ISO-8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS[.sss]Z

parameters.name: assignment
parameters.description: Task assignees - MY, GROUP,  MY_AND_GROUP (default), MY_AND_GROUP_ALL, REPORTEES, OWNER, REVIEWER, PREVIOUS, ALL, ADMIN

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Keyword in task title

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items per page, between 1 and 100, default 25

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Index for the first item on a page of list items, default 1

parameters.name: groupBy
parameters.description: Groups tasks by the selected task attribute

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Includes only to-do tasks if set to ToDo

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action

parameters.name: showPermission
parameters.description: Permission - true or false

parameters.name: metadataFlag
parameters.description: Metadata - true or false(default)

parameters.name: totalResults
parameters.description: Total Result - true (default) or false

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Returned items must be created later than the specified time, in ISO-8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS[.sss]Z

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Returned items must be created before the specified time, in ISO-8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS[.sss]Z

404.description: Task List not found for view

get.description: Retrieves a task by task ID (The task number).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Task ID (Internally known as the task number)

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Value of all fields that are to be expanded (detailed) - All, comments, attachments, history, payload. If not specified Links to each of the fields is returned.

parameters.name: metadataFlag
parameters.description: Metadata - true or false

404.description: Task not found for given ID.

put.description: Performs the action on a specific task identifier, based on the payload. The following actions are available and the actions depend on the application: APPROVE, REJECT, REASSIGN, DELEGATE, WITHDRAW, SUSPEND, RESUME, DELETE, PURGE, ACQUIRE, RELEASE, PUSHBACK, ERROR, ADHOC_ROUTE, INFO_REQUEST, INFO_SUBMIT, SKIP_CURRENT_ASSIGNMENT, SAVE and ESCALATE. Custom Actions depend on the task definition.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Task ID

200.description: Success . In case of PURGE, a title specifying task id successfully purged will be returned.

400.description: The tasknumber is invalid.No action will be performed.

get.description:
Retrieves task attachments.
If Oracle Content and Experience (documents) is enabled for this task, attachments do not apply.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Task ID

post.description:
Adds an attachment to a task.
If Oracle Content and Experience (documents) is enabled for this task, attachments do not apply.

get.summary: Retrieve a Task Attachment by Name
get.description:
Retrieves an attachment by name.
If Oracle Content and Experience (documents) is enabled for this task, attachments do not apply.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Task ID

parameters.name: attachmentName
parameters.description: Attachment name

404.description: Attachment with given name not found

delete.description:
Deletes an attachment by name.
If Oracle Content and Experience (documents) is enabled for this task, attachments do not apply.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Task ID

parameters.name: attachmentName
parameters.description: Name of attachment to be deleted

get.summary: Retrieve a Task Attachment as a Stream
get.description:
Retrieves an attachment by name as a stream.
If Oracle Content and Experience (documents) is enabled for this task, attachments do not apply.

200.description: Displays the file contents. Response type will be based on the mime type of the attachment.

404.description: No inputstream exists for attachment with given name

post.description: Adds a comment to a task.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Task Id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Task ID

parameters.name: user-agent
parameters.description: User-agent

parameters.name: readOnly
parameters.description: To retrieve a read only form uri - True; else false

404.description: Form URL not found for given task

get.description: Retrieves the history of a task.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Task ID

parameters.name: displayStyle
parameters.description: Style in which to display the history of given task ID - flatList (default)

get.description: Retrieves the payload of a task.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Task ID

put.description: Updates the payload of a task.

final.description: Indicates whether the task update is the final update.

contextId.description: Conversation identifier. For `message/stream`, this must be nested under `params.message`.

taskId.description: Optional task identifier used for resumed or task-associated message flows.

routingAction.description: Only applicable for ADHOC_ROUTE. Accepts the custom action to be performed before routing the task.

routingType.description: allowed values are Simple,Sequential and Parallel

voterPercentage.description: applicable only when routingType is Parallel

defaultActionForGroupVote.description: applicable only when routingType is Parallel

routingAction.description: Only applicable for ADHOC_ROUTE. Accepts the custom action to be performed before routing the task.

routingType.description: Only applicable for ADHOC_ROUTE.Accepts the type of routing to be performed. Allowed values are Simple,Sequential and Parallel

votersPercentage.description: applicable only when routingType is Parallel.Default value is 0

defaultActionForGroupVote.description: applicable only when routingType is Parallel
